hypothesis: Continual pre-training of a language model on MOF corpora in which each MOFid is augmented with computed 3D-derived scalar descriptors (pore volume, surface area, and largest cavity diameter) will reduce MAE on the QMOF band-gap prediction task by at least 15% compared to a model pre-trained on PMC+PubChem text alone when both are fine-tuned with ≤5,000 supervised examples.
